title: Municipal leaders went to Tianhui Group to investigate and guide work
contentHtml:
December 31,Qinhuangdao CityFeng Zhiyong, deputy mayor of the government and member of the party group, Li Yutang, deputy director of the Municipal Development and Reform Commission, Chen Baojun, a fourth-level researcher of the Municipal Industry and Information Technology Bureau, Dong Lei, section chief of the Municipal Industry and Information Technology Bureau, and Qian Zhenshan, section chief of the Municipal Science and Technology Bureau, went to Tianhui Group for investigation and guidance. Chen Zhanqin, Secretary of the Party Working Committee and Director of the Management Committee of the Harbor Economic Development Zone, and leaders of the Northern Logistics Park participated in the investigation. Chairman Zeng Shengwen, General Manager Du Shuang and Finance Department Director Jiang Sheng gave a warm reception.

At the symposium, Vice Mayor Feng Zhiyong first understood the business modules and development advantages of Tianhui Group, conducted an in-depth discussion on the Haojuntong network transportation platform project, and discussed the construction progress and problems encountered by the company's ongoing project Tianhui Logistics Industrial Park.Chairman Zeng Shengwen elaborated on the development history of Tianhui Group and the difficulties encountered in the current stage of corporate development.

Vice Mayor Feng Zhiyong expressed his appreciation for Tianhui Group's achievements and contributions and extended his best wishes for Tianhui Group's further development in the future. Vice Mayor Feng Zhiyong pointed out that it is necessary to fully integrate the "14th Five-Year Plan" and the long-term goals for 2035 to make good future plans for Tianhui Group. In specific work, we must focus on key points, make up for shortcomings, strengths and weaknesses, identify our own advantages, establish a corporate image, and increase the influence of Tianhui Group.
titleZh: 市领导到天晖集团调研指导工作
contentHtmlZh:
12月31日，秦皇岛市政府副市长、党组成员冯志永、市发改委副主任李玉堂、市工信局四级调研员陈宝君、市工信局科长董磊、市科技局科长钱振山一行到天晖集团调研指导工作，海港经济开发区党工委书记、管委会主任陈占勤以及北部物流园区领导参加了调研。董事长曾胜文、总经理杜霜及财务部主管姜晟进行热情接待。

座谈会上，冯志永副市长首先对天晖集团业务模块和发展优势情况进行了了解，对皓俊通网络运输平台项目进行了深入探讨，并对企业在建项目天晖物流产业园的建设进度及遇到问题进行探讨。董事长曾胜文详细阐述了天晖集团的发展历史以及现阶段企业发展中所遇到的困难。

冯志永副市长对天晖集团取得的成绩及所做贡献表示赞赏并对天晖集团在未来的进一步发展致以良好祝愿。冯志永副市长指出，要充分结合“十四五”规划和二〇三五年远景目标，做好天晖集团的未来规划，在具体工作中，要抓重点、补短板、强弱项，找准自己的优势点，树立企业形象，提高天晖集团的影响力。
